---
title: "Gabriel Zangirolani"
image: propic.jpeg
about:
  template: trestles
  links: 
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/gabriel-zangirolani-33ab2188/
    - icon: mortarboard
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=CPaRJxsAAAAJ&hl=en
  
---

:::{#hero-heading}

Researcher in the OHSU Knight Cancer Institute specializing in the development of novel methods of specialized cancer diagnosis and treatment. Laboratory and analytic techniques primarily involve spatial proteomics/transcriptomics, immunofluorescent staining and high-level imaging. 


## Education

Oregon Health & Science University | Portland, OR
M.S. in Biostatistics | Sept 2025 - Present

University of Massachusetts, Amherst | Amherst, MA
B.S in Biochemistry & Molecular Biology | Sept 2017 - May 2021

## Experience

OHSU | Medical Laboratory Technician | July 2022 - present

Seres Therapeutics | Quality Control Analyst | August 2021 - April 2022

:::
